# OpenCode School

> OpenCode School is an interactive course that teaches people how to use OpenCode. Students enroll on the homepage (https://opencode.school), get a student ID, then use OpenCode Desktop to work through lessons. An API is available for agents to fetch lesson content, acceptance criteria, and student progress.

When a student gives you their student ID, use the API to fetch their progress and the lesson they want to work on. Each lesson has `agentInstructions` describing what "done" looks like and how to verify it — follow them. When the criteria are met, mark the lesson complete with `PUT /api/progress/{studentId}` using body `{"lessonSlug": "...", "source": "agent"}` before telling the student.

## API

- [OpenAPI specification](https://opencode.school/api/openapi.json): Machine-readable spec describing all endpoints
- [All lessons](https://opencode.school/api/lessons): GET - JSON array of all lessons with content, acceptance criteria, and agent instructions
- [Single lesson](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/{slug}): GET - A single lesson by slug
- [Enroll](https://opencode.school/api/enroll): POST - Generate a student ID and create a progress record
- [Get progress](https://opencode.school/api/progress/{studentId}): GET - Fetch a student's completed lessons
- [Mark complete](https://opencode.school/api/progress/{studentId}): PUT - Mark a lesson complete (body: `{"lessonSlug": "...", "source": "agent"}`)

## Lessons

- [Prerequisites](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/prerequisites): System requirements check
- [Installation](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/installing-opencode): Install OpenCode Desktop
- [Configuration](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/configuration): Create a global config file
- [Permissions](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/permissions): Set up granular permission rules
- [AGENTS.md](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/agents-md): Write custom agent instructions
- [Models](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/models): Choose and configure AI models
- [MCP Servers](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/mcp-servers): Connect to external tools and services
- [Skills](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/skills): Create reusable agent behaviors
- [Modes](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/modes): Switch between Plan and Build mode
- [Not Just for Coding](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/not-just-for-coding): Use OpenCode for non-coding tasks
- [Workspaces](https://opencode.school/api/lessons/workspaces): Run multiple sessions in parallel
